case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT VS. FELIX NUNEZ et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT NUNEZ, FELIX DBA CHILE VERDE TAQUERIA RESTAURANT NUNEZ, MARIA DBA CHILE VERDE TAQUERIA RESTAURANT JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NUNEZ, FELIX DBA CHILE VERDE TAQUERIA RESTAURANT NUNEZ, MARIA DBA CHILE VERDE TAQUERIA RESTAURANT $3,750.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,750.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
